# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "artifacts"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - mkdir -p "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin" "$ARTIFACT_DIR/config"
    - echo "binary-content" > "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - chmod +x "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - echo "config-content" > "$ARTIFACT_DIR/config/app.conf"
  artifacts:
    name: "build-artifacts-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - artifacts/bin/
      - artifacts/config/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - chmod +x "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - cat "$ARTIFACT_DIR/config/app.conf"

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - chmod +x "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - "$ARTIFACT_DIR/bin/app"
    - cat "$ARTIFACT_DIR/config/app.conf"
